steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_insert_post( array( 'import_id' => 100, 'post_title' => 'Map for Leaflet demo', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => '<!-- wp:cartoblocks-for-leaflet/leaflet-map-block {"lat":37.171671,"lng":-3.579268,"zoom":14,"height":"440px","zoomControl":false,"markers":[{"lat":37.176321,"lng":-3.588581,"title":"Marker 1","content":"Marker 1"},{"lat":37.161958,"lng":-3.596563,"title":"Marker 2","content":"Marker 2"},{"lat":37.178099,"lng":-3.561459,"title":"Marker 3","content":"Marker 3"}],"circles":[{"lat":37.171465,"lng":-3.578882,"radius":1554,"fitbounds":false,"color":"#ff2121","weight":null,"opacity":null,"dashArray":"","classname":"","fill":true,"fillColor":"#361f1f","fillOpacity":null,"popup":"","visible":false}]} /-->' ) ); update_user_meta( 1, 'wp_persisted_preferences', array( 'core/edit-post' => array( 'welcomeGuide' => false ), '_modified' => gmdate( 'c' ) ) );
